title: selysia cordata
intro: Selysia cordata is a species of plant that belongs to the family of flowering plants, specifically in the genus Selysia. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and protecting against oxidative stress. Selysia cordata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
